General.Name: Nomad Technologies Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Byte Metaverse Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of network support services in Malaysia and the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Network Support Services and Network Connectivity Services; E-Commerce; and Online Game IP Authorization Management segments. It offers network support services, such as network infrastructure design and hardware installation, and network management and security services; network connectivity services, including intranet and internet connectivity solutions, and value-added services; and online game IP authorization management services. The company was formerly known as Michong Metaverse (China) Holdings Group Limited and changed its name to Byte Metaverse Holdings Limited in March 2024. Byte Metaverse Holdings Limited was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: C C Wu Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
